system.notes: 100kg Beast (Reducer), subterranean crawler, #App: 1, Treasure: None. Special attack; armor 0; speed 1.5m/action; Morale: automatic success. This mobile viscous green slime feeds on plants, animals, and metals, including weapons and armor. Green slime cannot dissolve stone. The slime will typically lurk on a ceiling or other high place, then drop upon an unsuspecting victim and attempt to engulf it. The victim of dropping green slime must throw DEX 8+ or be engulfed. The slime will completely digest an engulfed creature within 2d6 rounds. No magic can bring back a digested creature or its possessions. The slime is immune to all non-magical weapons but suffers double damage from any source of fire; even a lit torch will cause it 2d6 damage per attack. The engulfed victim, however, also suffers from such fire damage: victims take half the fire damage the slime takes (rounded up). A Restoration spell will immediately remove the slime from its victim. Immune to mind-affecting spells. (Instinct 0, Pack 7)
